grades.expectation: Response mentions checking competentperson.co.uk to verify if installer was registered
grades.reason: Response suggests searching FENSA/CERTASS by postcode but doesn't mention the official competentperson.co.uk registry

grades.expectation: Response mentions FENSA specifically as the relevant competent person scheme for windows
grades.reason: FENSA is mentioned multiple times as the primary competent person scheme for windows

grades.expectation: Response distinguishes between self-certification (competent person) and local authority routes
grades.reason: Clearly distinguishes between FENSA/CERTASS certificates (competent person) and LABC completion certificates/regularisation

grades.expectation: Response warns about the 'no approach' rule before pursuing indemnity insurance
grades.reason: Explicitly states indemnity is invalidated if local authority has been contacted and warns against approaching council

grades.expectation: Response mentions Part L (energy efficiency/insulation) as relevant regulation for windows
grades.reason: Mentions 'thermal performance' briefly but doesn't specifically reference Part L of Building Regulations
